metadata.description: All-in-one multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code — 186 agents, 84+ skills, 14 rules, 3 hooks, 3 MCP servers. Bundles agency-agents, everything-claude-code, and oh-my-claudecode with weekly CI auto-sync.

plugins.name: my-claude-orchestration
plugins.description: 186 agents (Boss orchestrator, Hephaestus autonomous worker, 157 agency specialists, 19 OMC agents), 84+ skills, 14 rules, behavioral correction hooks, and MCP servers (Context7, Exa, grep.app)
